authority: NUKIB (Národní úřad pro kybernetickou a informační bezpečnost)

sources.name: NUKIB Guidance Documents
sources.scope: National cybersecurity guidelines, technical standards, recommendations, NIS2 implementation guidance

sources.name: NUKIB Security Advisories
sources.scope: Security advisories, vulnerability alerts, threat intelligence, CVE references

sources.name: NUKIB Cybersecurity Frameworks
sources.scope: National Cybersecurity Framework, ISMS guidance, NIS2 implementation framework

known_gaps: Older archived NUKIB publications may not be included
Data may lag official publications by days to weeks
Coverage may be incomplete — not all NUKIB documents are ingested
